source.name: Philadelphia event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: Art Open Studio
events.description: Drop in and experiment with materials and process while creating a work of art!

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
events.venue: Independence Blue Cross Carousel House, Main Level

events.title: Makerspace Open Studio
events.description: Experiment with building, different materials, and new techniques as you create during our open-ended free play time in the Makerspace Studio.
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Noon Tunes Midday Singalong
events.description: Join us for an interactive music program where we’ll play some music, learn a song, then sing and dance along!

events.title: Art Workshop: Pop Art Posters
events.description: In honor of Pride Month, we are painting colorful posters inspired by the work of artist and activist Keith Haring.

events.title: Makerspace Workshop: Pride Amplified
events.description: Celebrate Pride Month by exploring the power of sound, music, and self-expression! We’ll honor the contributions of audio engineer and activist Boden Sandstrom as we experiment with sound waves and play with fun music tech!
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Soccer All Stars
events.description: Take turns dribbling, passing and shooting just like some of the soccer all stars here in Philly for the World Cup.

events.title: End of Day Parade
events.description: Follow the beat and stomp your feet as we end our day in a playful parade from Food & Family up to Hamilton Hall!

events.title: MAC at the Library Reception
events.description: Join us on Thursday night, June 11, 2026 starting at 5 PM to close out the library with All that JAZZ & ART Reception! There will be light food and drink (must be over 21 for wine). MAC at the Library is a collaboration between MAC and the Media-Upper Providence Free Library. events.title: Makerspace Open Studio
events.description: Experiment with building, different materials, and new techniques as you create during our open-ended free play time in the Makerspace Studio.
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Noon Tunes Midday Singalong
events.description: Join us for an interactive music program where we’ll play some music, learn a song, then sing and dance along!

events.title: End of Day Parade
events.description: Follow the beat and stomp your feet as we end our day in a playful parade from Food & Family up to Hamilton Hall!

events.title: Art Open Studio
events.description: Drop in and experiment with materials and process while creating a work of art!

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
events.venue: Independence Blue Cross Carousel House, Main Level

events.title: Celebration of Freedom Ceremony
events.description: Wawa Welcome America Independence Day morning ceremony at Independence Mall (599 Market Street).

events.title: Dino-Mite Summer at the Academy of Natural Sciences
events.description: Dino-Mite Summer at the Academy of Natural Sciences Special Event Enjoy Dino-Mite Summer with a hands-on dinosaur dig, live animals, and family activities at the Academy of Natural Sciences this July and August. Saturday, July 4
events.venue: Academy of Natural Sciences of Drexel University Events
